title: Brute Force Attempt on Banking Gateway
description: Observed 500+ failed login attempts from unknown IP 192.168.45.10 on Asset-01.

title: Unauthorized Data Export
description: Large data transfer (4.2GB) detected from Customer Data Vault to external sink s3://bank-exports-prod.

title: Malicious Process Execution
description: Detected 'mimikatz.exe' on SWIFT Message Router. Execution parent: PowerShell.exe.

title: Suspicious User Login (Anomalous Location)
description: User 'admin_tc' logged in from Pyongyang, North Korea. Expected: New York, USA.
